recent_excerpts: Microsoft released out-of-band patches for CVE-2026-40372, a 9.1-CVSS privilege escalation flaw in ASP.NET Core affecting all supported versions.
CVE-2026-33829 in Windows Snipping Tool allows attackers to steal NTLMv2 hashes via malicious links. A public PoC exploit targets the ms-screensketch protocol to enable credential relay attacks.
Microsoft released out-of-band updates for Windows Server 2019 and 2022 after April 2026 security patches caused boot failures and domain controller authentication issues, forcing some administrators
